column1: # VASP Wiki INCAR tag help for pei_vasp_univ_find_and_change.
# Retrieved: 2026-07-20; 609 INCAR keys/families from 612 category pages.
# NPPSTR and PFLAT use their page titles because their Wiki TAGDEF templates currently name another tag.
# NICS, POSNICS, NMRCAR.magres, and Profiling are category pages but not INCAR keys.
# Format: TAG<TAB>concise description; common choices and/or defaults.
